name: PolarProcess
description: Process lifecycle management, resource scheduling, and system profiling — migrated from SOTAgent's process-manager + scheduler + profiler + command-guard + tailscale-client modules.

requirements.need: 进程启停/健康检查/远程转发 — 管理服务全生命周期
requirements.approach: Hono server 挂载 /api/services/* + /api/processes/* 端点，sqlite 持久化进程状态，定时健康检查

features.name: GET /api/services
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: POST /api/services/:id/start
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: POST /api/services/:id/stop
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: POST /api/services/:id/restart
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: GET /api/processes
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: GET /api/processes/:id
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: POST /api/processes/:id/kill
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

requirements.need: 重任务队列/分时复用 — 资源调度器管理后台任务
requirements.approach: ResourceScheduler 管理重任务队列，检测系统空闲窗口，资源紧张时暂停任务

features.name: GET /api/tasks
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: POST /api/tasks/create
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: POST /api/tasks/:id/cancel
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: GET /api/tasks/:id/status
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: GET /api/scheduler/status
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: GET /api/scheduler/queue
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: POST /api/scheduler/config
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

requirements.need: Watchdog 进程监控 — 自动检测+重启+crash loop 保护
requirements.approach: Watchdog 定时健康检查所有项目的 health_endpoint，连续失败自动重启，重启耗尽发 lobster-event 触发 PolarPilot Agentic 自愈

features.name: GET /api/watchdog/status — 所有监控目标状态
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: POST /api/watchdog/pause/:service — 暂停某服务监控
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: POST /api/watchdog/resume/:service — 恢复某服务监控
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: 自动发现 polaris.json health_endpoint
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: 连续 3 次失败自动重启
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: crash loop 检测（5 分钟内 5 次重启）
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

features.name: lobster-events.jsonl 事件输出
evidence: 2026-06-10: feature verified in codebase (L2 gate audit backfill)

requirements.need: 系统资源画像 — 通过观察进程积累资源使用画像
requirements.approach: ResourceProfiler 采样进程 CPU/内存/GPU，逐步积累画像数据

depends_on.reason: 启动时通过 PolarPort HTTP API 取端口（POST /api/allocate）
